info.name: Content Broadcasting System — Full API Suite
info.description:
Complete test suite: all endpoints, happy paths, validation errors, RBAC enforcement, scheduling edge cases.

## Quick Start
1. `npm run seed` — creates default users in DB
2. Run ** Auth → Login as Principal** and **Login as Teacher 1** first — they auto-save tokens
3. For upload requests, click the `file` row and pick any local JPG/PNG/GIF
4. Run the full collection in order via Collection Runner for the complete E2E flow

## Seeded Credentials
| Role | Email | Password |
|------|-------|----------|
| Principal | principal@school.com | Principal@123 |
| Teacher 1 | teacher1@school.com | Teacher@123 |
| Teacher 2 | teacher2@school.com | Teacher@123 |

exec: console.log(' Teacher 1 token saved, id:', r.data.user.id);
console.log(' Teacher 2 token saved, id:', r.data.user.id);

formdata.value: Solving linear equations step by step

item.name: Upload Content — Future Window (will NOT show live) [201]
item.description: start_time is tomorrow — content approved but inactive. Tests edge case: approved but outside window.

exec: pm.test('Status 400 — must provide both times', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));
pm.test('Status 400 — start must be before end', () => pm.response.to.have.status(400));

item.name: No Auth Token on Protected Route [401]
Delete Uploaded Content [200]
item.description: Teachers CAN delete their own non-approved content.

exec: pm.test('Status 200 — rejected content can be deleted', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Status 422 — cannot delete approved content', () => pm.response.to.have.status(422));
pm.test('Status 404 — route not found handler works', () => pm.response.to.have.status(404));

item.name: Principal Cannot Get Own-only Content (principal has no uploads)

exec: pm.test('Status 200 — principal can view all content', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
